items.title: Everton captain Finnigan signs one-year extension
items.summary: Everton captain Megan Finnigan signs a one-year contract extension with the Women's Super League club.

items.title: United seal $64M Santos move, Ederson's stalls
items.summary: Manchester United have signed midfielder Andrey Santos from Chelsea, the club have announced.

items.title: Source: Villa's Digne agrees deal for PSG return
items.summary: Paris Saint-Germain have agreed a deal with Lucas Digne to bring the Aston Villa defender back to Paris after paying his £10 million ($13.3m) release clause, a source told ESPN.

items.title: Sources: United in advanced talks for Tielemans
items.summary: Manchester United are in advanced talks to sign Youri Tielemans from Aston Villa, sources have told ESPN.

McGregor to undergo surgery but hopes to fight again
items.summary: Conor McGregor will undergo surgery after his return fight against Max Holloway at UFC 329 ended prematurely due to a knee injury, but he hopes to fight again.

items.title: Dutch referee dies weeks after being dropped from World Cup
items.summary: Dutch football referee Rob Dieperink dies aged 38, weeks after he was dropped from officiating at the World Cup because of a police investigation in the UK.

items.title: Revs re-sign USMNT's Turner on loan from Lyon
items.summary: The New England Revolution announced on Monday that it has extended the loan of United States men's national team goalkeeper Matt Turner from Ligue 1 side Lyon through the end of 2026.

items.title: USWNT to host world No. 1 Spain twice in October
items.summary: The United States women's national team will host world No. 1 and reigning World Cup champions Spain in a pair of friendly matches in October, U.S. Soccer announced on Monday.

items.title: Police investigating death of South Africa's Adams...
items.summary: Police said Monday they are investigating the death of South Africa World Cup football player Jayden Adams, after his body was discovered this weekend at a property in the city of Cape Town.

items.title: Alonso wants Enzo Fernández to stay at Chelsea
items.summary: Chelsea manager Xabi Alonso has said he wants to keep Enzo Fernández at the club amid a potential exit this summer.
